input.title: ReviewPulse Multi-Platform Review Scraper
input.description: Scrapes reviews from Google Maps, Yelp, and Trustpilot for a given business.

urls.title: Business URLs
urls.description: List of business profile URLs to scrape reviews from. Supports Google Maps, Yelp, and Trustpilot.

maxReviews.title: Max Reviews Per Platform
maxReviews.description: Maximum number of reviews to collect per platform URL.

businessId.title: Business ID
businessId.description: Unique identifier for the business. Used for tracking and webhook payloads.

webhookUrl.title: Webhook URL
webhookUrl.description: URL to POST scraped reviews to upon completion (e.g., your ReviewPulse API endpoint).
